prose: The Fukui dual descriptor indicates the most electrophilic site on the oxygen atom of formaldehyde, with an electrophilic Fukui index of approximately 0.59595, calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level with the standard tier in the gas phase. The calculation included Mulliken partial charges and was performed with the chemkit tool. The method used was DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set, in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
